CELINE25|TEEN GARANCE Woven Handbag-
🆕🆕🆕
Ultra-smooth✨New GARANCE
CELINE's golden 1960s, a must-have patent leather bag🎩
-Just the right amount of sophistication, pure and elegant
-Exquisite black and gold~mysterious and charming, paired with autumn/winter color schemes for a high-end look💯
-New design handle strap~more comfortable and structured than traditional shoulder bags🆙
Sisters who saw the show~should be captivated by it🤩

items.name_en: New Arrival🅰️🅰️ CE TILLY Shoulder Bag
items.name_cn:
New Arrival🅰️🅰️ CE TILLY Shoulder Bag
CE's best-selling shoulder bag, handwoven body with natural warmth in every texture. Get close and smell the faint scent of grass and wood, as if storing the freshness of the entire summer.
🪧The handle is paired with soft cowhide, adding durability and cleverly balancing the rusticity of the straw with the premium feel of the leather, simple and exquisite, complementing the overall style.
💼Don't let its small appearance fool you, it holds a lot! The interior space is organized, easily accommodating daily essentials like a phone, wallet, sunscreen, and lipstick. The built-in inner pocket is perfect for important cards and keys, making them easy to access.
🌟And it is simply a "universal player" in styling. Pair it with a white dress for a lazy French vacation vibe at the beach, the photo atmosphere is maxed out.
For daily wear with simple T-shirts and jeans, it becomes the finishing touch, adding a touch of sophistication and casualness to a casual outfit. Whether for vacation, picnics, or shopping, it fits perfectly✅
Model:115703
Color:Raffia/Brown
Size:22x13.5x4cm (with original packaging)

items.name_en: CELIN_E 2026🆕|VICTOIRE Medium Soft Woven Triumphal Arch Bag
items.name_cn:
CELIN_E 2026🆕|VICTOIRE Medium Soft Woven Triumphal Arch Bag
CELINE finally released a bag that can be worn crossbody or shoulder👏
Celine SU24 Latest Style - Victoire
Victoire means victory and triumph✌
Long-awaited chain Triumphal Arch bag, many celebrities' style~
Uses premium natural raffia
Premium grain and soft touch
Chain features triangular cut for 100% comfort, also super shiny jewelry craftsmanship✨
Natural raffia, sheepskin lining, gold hardware, crossbody and shoulder carry, full steel TRIOMPHE buckle closure, 2 main compartments, 1 interior flat pocket, 1 interior center zip pocket, full steel metal slider chain, min length 25cm and max length 47cm
Size: 25 X 15 X 8 cm
No.: 115853
